properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v4 v5 v4 v2 v2 v2 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You dance over me While I am unaware You sing all around But I never hear the sound

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord I'm amazed by You Lord I'm amazed by You Lord I'm amazed by You And how You love me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You paint the morning sky With miracles in mind My hope will always stand For You Hold me in Your hand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: How deep (how deep) How wide (how wide) How great (how great) is Your love for me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: How deep (how deep) How wide (how wide) How great (how great) is Your love for me (praise Your love)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lord I'm amazed by You Lord I'm amazed by You Lord I'm amazed by You And how You love me Still I'm amazed by You Still I'm amazed by You Lord We're amazed by You
